title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, October 04 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 04/10/2022
Image reference: 2022-10-04_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-october-04-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulkers values have remained stable. Panamax Cymona Gemini (83,000 DWT, Jun 2006, Tadotsu Tsuneishi) sold to Minoa Marine Ltd for USD 15.85 mil, VV Value USD 15.39 mil - BWTS fitted. Panamax Pedhoulas Trader (82,300 DWT, May 2006, Tadotsu Tsuneishi) sold to Minoa Marine Ltd for USD 15.85 mil, VV Value USD 15.31 mil - BWTS fitted
Panamax Nord Corona (81,600 DWT, Sep 2019, Jiangsu Hantong Ship Heavy Industry) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 29.00 mil, VV Value USD 27.22 mil - BWTS fitted.
